'''Novor Major''' was the primary star in the [[Novor system/Legends|Novor system]]. It was a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]] that had destroyed the innermost seventeen of its thirty-three planets when it had expanded to that status millennia before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
